abilities.description: Each opponent secretly chooses silence or snitch, then the choices are revealed. If each opponent chose silence, CARDNAME deals 4 damage to each of them. If each opponent chose snitch, CARDNAME deals 8 damage to each of them. Otherwise, CARDNAME deals 12 damage to each opponent who chose silence.

effect.description: Each opponent secretly chooses silence or snitch, then the choices are revealed. If each opponent chose silence, CARDNAME deals 4 damage to each of them. If each opponent chose snitch, CARDNAME deals 8 damage to each of them. Otherwise, CARDNAME deals 12 damage to each opponent who chose silence.
effect.name: GenericChoice
